proposal: Teach the research agent to cover F1 qualifying (and sprint/sprint-qualifying on sprint weekends) as its own event per GP weekend — not just the Sunday race. Added a sport-specific 'F1 weekends' rule to scripts/agents/research.md (modeled on the existing 'Stage races' rule), citing the interests.json 'kvalifisering + race' brief and instructing the agent to confirm session times against formula1.com (not ESPN, per source-quirks) and use Viaplay.
evidence: coverage-audit.json (2026-07-20T06:46Z): the F1-qualifying gap ('Ungarn GP-kvalifiseringen ... står ikke som eget event — tavla har kun selve løpet') has now recurred FOUR audits in a row (17–20 July), recurrences=3, and was bumped low→medium per the recall-exhaustion rule so an evergreen low-severity hole would not calcify. The audit explicitly defers the call to research/owner: 'research/owner avgjør om kvalik bør legges til per GP-helg.'
interests.json line 193 states the owner interest explicitly: 'F1 hele sesongen — kvalifisering + race'. Qualifying is a first-class wish, not an inference.

research.md had NO instruction to add F1 qualifying — grep for kvalif/qualif/sprint/session in the prompt returns only the generic 'schedule resumes' aside (line 61). The agent has consistently built one f1 event per weekend (the race), so this is a recurring coverage gap the prompt never told it to fill.
npm test: 753 passed (46 files), incl. the agent-prompts coherence test that scans research.md for valid skill references (source-quirks reference intact).
